song.title: Beautiful The Blood
song.presentation: V1 P1 C V2 P1 C P1 C B E
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Intro (x2) F#m D A E/G# . A E D A 1) I never knew death could be so sweet .F#m E D A I never knew surrender could feel so free .F#m E D A I never seen such meekness in majesty .F#m E D A That the blood of Jesus was bled for me [P1] Pre-Chorus . A D E F#m And now I sing freedom for all my days . A D E F#m It's only by the power of the cross I'm raised . A D E The King of Glory rescued me [C] Chorus . A D How beautiful the blood flow . F#m D How merciful the love shown . A D The King of glory poured out . F#m D Victorious are we now [V2] . A E D A 2) Never knew through these nails| Would love unfold .F#m E D A Never knew these wounds| Would heal my soul .F#m E D A I've never seen such beauty| And sorrow meet .F#m E D A The blood of Jesus was bled for me [B] Bridge . A How beautiful You are . Bm How merciful You are . F#m How glorious You are . D E Christ our Savior
[E] 1) I never knew death could be so sweet I never knew surrender could feel so free I never seen such meekness in majesty That the blood of Jesus was bled for me Pre-Chorus And now I sing freedom for all my days It's only by the power of the cross I'm raised The King of Glory rescued me Chorus How beautiful the blood flow How merciful the love show The King of glory poured out Victorious are we now 2) Never knew through these nails would love unfold And never knew these wounds would heal my soul I've never seen such beauty and sorrow meet The blood of Jesus was bled for me Bridge How beautiful You are How merciful You are How glorious You are Christ our Savior
